documentation.text:
@title AnonymousBallot
 @notice A privacy-preserving voting contract that maintains two completely
         independent state mappings — one for tracking who has voted (by hash)
         and one for tallying votes per candidate. The separation, combined
         with off-chain Fisher-Yates shuffling of candidate IDs before
         submission, ensures no on-chain link between a voter's identity
         and their candidate choice.
@dev Identity tracking — only stores whether a voterHash has been used
@dev Vote tallies — only stores count per candidateId
@notice Emitted when voters are marked — only count, NOT the hashes
@notice Emitted when votes are recorded — only count, NOT the candidateIds

@param _relayer     Address of the relayer wallet (Hardhat account #0)
 @param _candidateIds Array of valid candidate IDs for this election
@notice Advance election state: NotStarted → Active → Ended

of valid candidate IDs for this election","_relayer":"Address of the relayer wallet (Hardhat account #0)"}},"markVoters(bytes32[])":{"params":{"voterHashes":"Array of keccak256 hashes of voter identities"}},"recordVotes(uint256[])":{"params":{"_candidateIds":"Array of candidate IDs to record votes for"}}},"stateVariables":{"candidateIds":{"details":"Registered candidate IDs (for validation)"},"hasVoted":{"details":"Identity tracking \u2014 only stores whether a voterHash has been used"},"voteCount":{"details":"Vote tallies \u2014 only stores count per candidateId"}},"title":"AnonymousBallot","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"ElectionStateChanged(uint8)":{"notice":"Emitted when election state transitions"},"VotersMarked(uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when voters are marked \u2014 only count, NOT the hashes"},"VotesRecorded(uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when votes are recorded \u2014 only count, NOT the candidateIds"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"advanceElectionState()":{"notice":"Advance election state: NotStarted \u2192 Active \u2192 Ended"},"markVoters(bytes32[])":{"notice":"Mark an array of voterHashes as having voted.         Reverts if ANY has already voted \u2014 atomic batch."},"recordVotes(uint256[])":{"notice":"Record votes for an array of candidateIds (already shuffled off-chain).         Each entry increments the candidate's tally by 1."}},"notice":"A privacy-preserving voting contract that maintains two completely         independent state mappings \u2014 one for tracking who has voted (by hash)         and one for tallying votes per candidate. The separation, combined         with off-chain Fisher-Yates shuffling of candidate IDs before         submission, ensures no on-chain link between a voter's identity         and their candidate choice.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/AnonymousBallot.sol":"AnonymousBallot"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/AnonymousBallot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf4a0726ecb4d5790643291427d7dccc4d2c8719d1a8b2a5fefe40f72fa11b113","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7347c40c6894033ba717696a377d1b2059aa4844fb2874ee07adbc43a53b2159","dweb:/ipfs/QmRjni8PLddJHvR4T2wu9Xbd84StRFmcDAN6gf8fzG7xwZ"]}},"version":1}
